---
title: "MIT Capstone: Applied Data Science — Leveraging AI for Decision-making"
description: "Capstone presentation for the MIT Certificate in Applied Data Science: Leveraging AI for Decision-making (2023)."
author: "Ian Gault"
date: "2023-12-01"
categories: [data science, machine learning, presentation]
image: market_segmentation.png
---

<iframe
  src="Capstone Presentation Gault.pptx.pdf"
  style="width: 100%; height: 80vh; border: none;"
  title="MIT Capstone Presentation — Ian Gault">
</iframe>

<a href="Capstone Presentation Gault.pptx.pdf" target="_blank">Open PDF in new tab</a>
